caption.full:
Mark Wahlberg is unrecognizable as hitman Gregory Scarpa in 'By Any.

Mark Wahlberg shared his excitement for the trailer release of his new true-story film, By Any Means. He plays notorious Mafia killer Gregory Scarpa, nearly unrecognizable with prosthetics and a wig. The film also stars Yahya Abdul-Mateen II as an FBI agent investigating civil rights murders.

Send this to someone who loves a good transformation!

caption.firstComment: Hard to believe it’s him under all that prosthetics and hair—does this look convincing to you?
